# Pull Request

## Summary

Briefly describe the change.

## Scope

- [ ] Electron main process
- [ ] Electron preload
- [ ] React renderer
- [ ] Local transcription
- [ ] USB/device workflow
- [ ] Docs/build tooling

## Local-Only Check

- [ ] No hosted transcription provider was added
- [ ] No hosted LLM/chat provider was added
- [ ] No external calendar sync path was added
- [ ] Any new network access is local/loopback or clearly documented

## Testing

- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run test:run`
- [ ] Manual Windows USB test, if device behavior changed

## Notes

Add any migration notes, screenshots, or follow-up work.
